name: tool_test_generation
description: Generate comprehensive test cases for a tool
template:
Generate 5 comprehensive test cases for the following tool:

Tool Name: {tool_name}
Description: {tool_description}

For each test case, provide:
- TEST: [descriptive name]
- INPUT: [input parameters as JSON]
- EXPECTED: [expected output or behavior]
- TYPE: [unit/integration/edge_case]

Focus on:
1. Normal use cases (happy path)
2. Edge cases (empty input, null, extremes)
3. Error conditions
4. Integration scenarios
5. Performance scenarios

Example format:
TEST: Basic functionality
INPUT: {"data": [1, 2, 3], "operation": "sum"}
EXPECTED: 6
TYPE: unit

Provide 5 diverse test cases covering different scenarios.
system_prompt: You are a test engineer specializing in Python unit tests. Generate thorough, realistic test cases that validate functionality and catch edge cases. Be specific and precise.

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: Name of the tool to generate tests for

parameters.name: tool_description
parameters.description: Description of what the tool does

name: tool_optimization
description: Optimize tool code to address performance or quality issues
template:
Optimize the following Python tool to address performance issues:

Tool Name: {tool_name}

Current Code:
```python
{current_code}
```

Identified Issues:
{issues}

Performance Data:
{performance_data}

Generate an optimized version that:
1. Maintains the same functionality and API
2. Addresses all identified issues
3. Improves execution performance
4. Adds better error handling
5. Includes input validation
6. Adds caching if beneficial
7. Maintains code readability

Return ONLY the optimized Python code with the execute() function. No explanations, just code.
system_prompt: You are a Python performance optimization expert. Generate efficient, production-ready code that solves the identified issues while maintaining functionality. Focus on measurable performance improvements.

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: Name of the tool being optimized

name: tool_security_audit
description: Analyze tool code for security vulnerabilities
template:
Perform a security audit of the following Python tool:

Tool Name: {tool_name}

Code:
```python
{code}
```

Analyze for:
1. Dangerous imports (os, subprocess, eval, exec)
2. File system access risks
3. Network access risks
4. Code injection vulnerabilities
5. Resource exhaustion risks
6. Input validation issues

Provide assessment in this format:

SECURITY LEVEL: [SAFE/WARNING/DANGEROUS]

VULNERABILITIES:
- [List each vulnerability found]

RISKS:
- [List potential risks]

RECOMMENDATIONS:
- [List specific security improvements]

SAFE FOR PRODUCTION: [YES/NO/WITH_RESTRICTIONS]
system_prompt: You are a security expert specializing in Python code auditing. Be thorough and conservative - identify all potential security risks.

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: Name of the tool being audited
